gap_summaries.title: seed_data config read but never applied during provisioning
gap_summaries.description: build_env_config reads seed_data from profile.rules.system_env.seed_data and stores it in SystemEnvConfig, but _provision_minimal and _provision_full never applied it. Environments would start empty.
gap_summaries.fix: Added _apply_seed_data helper called after successful compose-up (minimal) and helm-install (full). For minimal tier, runs docker compose exec; for full tier, runs kubectl apply.

gap_summaries.title: HR6(e) cert-cadence has no rule or category mapping
gap_summaries.description: cert-cadence is designated as a human/release gate checkpoint per HR6(e). No category rule existed, so profiles listing cert_cadence in system categories would get a generic fallback rule.
gap_summaries.fix: Added cert_cadence_rule returning CONCERNS (human review required) when no evidence exists, PASS when human sign-off evidence present. Registered in CATEGORY_RULES and added cert_cadence to VALID_SYSTEM_CATEGORIES.

gap_summaries.title: Namespace not sanitized for K8s compatibility
gap_summaries.description: build_env_config constructed namespace from epic_id + sha prefix without sanitizing. K8s namespaces require lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, max 63 chars. Uppercase epic IDs or special chars would cause kubectl failures.
gap_summaries.fix: Added _sanitize_namespace: lowercases, replaces non-[a-z0-9-] with hyphens, truncates to 63 chars, strips trailing hyphens.

gap_summaries.title: _provision_full ignores Helm install failures
gap_summaries.description: _provision_full ran helm install but discarded the return code. A failed Helm install returned provisioned=True, letting system collectors run against an unconfigured cluster.
gap_summaries.fix: Check helm_result.returncode; return provisioned=False on non-zero exit.

gap_summaries.title: Context manager calls teardown when provision failed
gap_summaries.description: system_env context manager always called teardown_system_env in finally block, even when provisioned=False. This wasted time and could produce confusing error output from teardown commands against non-existent resources.
gap_summaries.fix: Added if info.provisioned guard before teardown call.
